hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys; v=sys.version_info; exit(0 if v>=(3,6) else 1)" 2>/dev/null || python -c "import sys; v=sys.version_info; exit(0 if v>=(3,6) else 1)" 2>/dev/null || py -c "import sys; v=sys.version_info; exit(0 if v>=(3,6) else 1)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'codex-review: Python 3.6+ not found. Install Python 3 for codex-review plugin to work.' >&2
